case_title: CHASE BANK USA, N.A. VS. ARKADY KOGAN et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHASE BANK USA, N.A. SERVED MAY-04-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KOGAN, ARKADY
DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CCP 1033 FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHASE BANK USA, N.A.
DECLARATION RE: LOST ORIGINAL CONTRACT AND WAIVER OF EXCESS INTEREST FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHASE BANK USA, N.A.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHASE BANK USA, N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT KOGAN, ARKADY DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-18-2010
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF ENTRY OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHASE BANK USA, N.A.
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $383.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT KOGAN, ARKADY
DECLARATION RE: WAIVER OF ATTORNEY'S FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHASE BANK USA, N.A.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHASE BANK USA, N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KOGAN, ARKADY $16,030.97 PRINCIPAL, $197.64 INTEREST, $383.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $16,611.61, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
